experiences.title: ESOMAR Disciplinary Committee.
experiences.description:
Effective self-regulation is fundamental to maintain the highest standards of performance, quality and ethics. The ESOMAR Council, in line with the ESOMAR Disciplinary Procedures appoints members of the Disciplinary Committee (DC) by the recognition of professional achievements and aptitude for this important assignment
 
ESOMAR’s Disciplinary Committees are authorised to sanction a member if a complaint is upheld (sanctions include a reprimand, suspension, expulsion, notification to authorities and any other measures that are authorised by the Council

experiences.title: DOOH Measurement Standards Working Committee
experiences.description: El MRC (Media Rating Council) ha elegido a Daniel Cuende, director de innovación de CUENDE Infometrics, para incorporarse al DOOH Measurement Standards Working Committee. El objetivo del MRC es definir las directrices para la medición de audiencia de la Publicidad Exterior Digital en Estados Unidos. Otros miembros seleccionados son Clear Channel Outdoor, PosterScope, DPAA (Digital Place-based Advertising Association) y Nielsen On-Location, entre otros. La iniciativa de MRC tienen una clara vocación internacional, ya que este ambicioso proyecto es la primera iniciativa mundial que engloba tanto las vallas y marquesinas digitales como los nuevos soportes ubicados en interiores, como centros comerciales y redes de transporte.

accomplishment_honors_awards.title: Winner of the First Hackathon of BigData and Market Reseach from Microsoft and ESOMAR
accomplishment_honors_awards.description: https://rwconnect.esomar.org/microsoft-and-esomar-hackathon-challenge/?utm_source=cc&utm_medium=email&utm_content=members-november-2017&utm_campaign=monthly-update A variety of experienced international professionals at several career stages in the Market Research Industry accepted the challenge. Over the two-day hackathon, multiple teams effectively analyzed data across brand tracking, product experience and social data.  The hackathon culminated with 20-minute insights presentations to a jury of top research executives of the Microsoft, Unilever and Heineken companies. Ultimately, Daniel Cuende, Innovation manager of CUENDE Infometrics, who had partnered with college student Youssef Medhat Kassem, achieved the winning strategy.

accomplishment_honors_awards.title: FEPE Innovation Award for OoH Audience measurement
accomplishment_honors_awards.description: http://www.metricooh.com/?p=234 The award recognises CUENDE’s revolutionary audiences measuring system for the contribution it has made to the outdoor (Out-of-Home, or OOH) advertising industry. The system combines analysis of big data and the detection of vehicles in hi-res satellite images with data obtained from interconnected cars and smartphone apps in GPS traffic flows. Once collected, the information is integrated with travel habits surveys, thus allowing OOH companies, advertisers and media agencies to obtain audience measurements on both panels and networks. The information also includes socio-demographic and lifestyle profiling, which provides the OOH industry with audience data comparable with the geo-planning metrics available to other advertising media.
